_comment: Copy to ~/.hearth/watches.json (or set HUB_WATCHES_FILE). `compiledSpec` is exactly what Qwen emits when you author a watch in plain English — author one in the Hearth app and paste its spec here, or hand-write one like this. Replace nodeId with your node's id (printed as `id node-XXXX` on boot / shown in `curl http://localhost:8899/nodes`). Calibrate the threshold: run the node, note the idle board.temp, set `right` a few degrees above it, then cup the chip in your hand to cross it.
title: Warn me if the board gets hot
notify: The board just crossed the threshold ({detail}).
